features: Powerful 16G Protein Per Serving: Each packet is rich in grass-fed hydrolyzed collagen to nourish your skin, joints, and muscles while supporting gut health and overall wellness.
Glow From Within With 5G Collagen: Packed with collagen to support skin elasticity and smooth wrinkles, this bone broth helps you look and feel your best, inside and out.
Convenient, On-The-Go Nutrition: Lightweight and portable packets are ideal for busy lifestyles—simply mix with hot water to enjoy a nourishing, satisfying meal anytime, anywhere.

Keto & Paleo-Friendly: Designed to fit seamlessly into low-carb lifestyles, this bone broth is free from artificial ingredients, sugar, gluten, and dairy, making it the perfect choice for clean eating.

Created By Renowned Bone Broth Pioneer: Formulated by New York Times bestselling author and nutrition expert Dr. Kellyann Petrucci, these protein-packed bone broth packets are rooted in her dedication to health, beauty, and vitality.
ingredients: Protein bone broth blend (grass-fed bovine hydrolyzed collagen, chicken bone broth), natural flavor, potassium chloride, onion powder, carrot powder, sea salt, silica, parsley flakes, black pepper, turmeric powder, garlic powder, reishi mushroom powder.
parentTitle: Dr. Kellyann Bone Broth Collagen Powder Packets (7 Servings) – 16g Protein, Grass-Fed Hydrolyzed Collagen, Keto & Paleo-Friendly
title: Dr. Kellyann Bone Broth Collagen Powder Packets (7 Servings) – 16g Protein, Grass-Fed Hydrolyzed Collagen, Keto & Paleo-Friendly
